name: 星港アトラス 蒼空スチームファンタジー

qualityProfile.targetLevel: commercial-grade Japanese mobile game UI asset
qualityProfile.sourcePolicy: Use licensed or purchased assets only to derive quality criteria; do not imitate a specific asset pack or reproduce distinctive art.
principles: Readable silhouette at target size and reduced preview size
Clean functional lane for runtime text, values, or child icons
Strong edge separation against bright sky and dark UI surfaces
Controlled ornament density that raises value without hiding function
Clear material reads for brass, parchment, glass, cloth, and deck wood
productionChecks: Target-size fit with useful implementation padding
Clean alpha boundary for transparent assets or precise chroma-key cleanup
No accidental runtime text baked into reusable PNGs
Consistent bevel depth, rim highlight, lighting direction, and family logic

layoutAnatomy.outerDecoration: Treat the outer rim, corners, tabs, sockets, and silhouette breaks as the decorative zone for brass trim, bolts, wing accents, and material flourishes.
layoutAnatomy.contentSurface: Treat the declared inner surface, runtime text slots, and child-placement rectangles as calm content zones with lower contrast, simpler texture, and no busy ornament.
layoutAnatomy.boundaryTreatment: Separate decoration and content with a clear inner bevel, inset shadow, rim highlight, color/material step, or framed parchment-to-metal transition.
checks: The eye should immediately understand where decoration ends and usable content begins
High-frequency patterning stays outside runtime text and child-placement zones
Do not fill empty content surfaces with fake labels, rows, icons, or unreadable decorative glyphs

panel.outerDecoration: Use slim perimeter trim, end caps, or rails for style; avoid heavy decoration across the middle of the panel.
panel.contentSurface: Keep the panel interior stable enough for numbers, labels, progress bars, or repeated child UI.
panel.boundaryTreatment: Use a thin highlight/shadow pair or inset groove to make the readable interior distinct from the outer shell.
checks: Interior remains calm even when the panel is narrow
Repeated panels keep the same trim thickness and lighting logic

card_frame.outerDecoration: Use corners, outer frame, header mounts, and optional icon sockets for ornament; keep them outside functional lanes.
card_frame.contentSurface: Leave a broad readable center area for child rows, art, titles, and runtime copy.
card_frame.boundaryTreatment: Use a layered frame-to-parchment or frame-to-dark-surface transition that reads at target size.
checks: The frame does not pre-bake rows, buttons, labels, or child icons
Corner ornaments do not invade declared content slots

button.outerDecoration: Put wings, caps, bevels, gems, and ornamental shine on the perimeter or behind the pressable silhouette.
button.contentSurface: Preserve the center label lane as a clean, high-contrast but low-detail surface.
button.boundaryTreatment: Use pressable bevel depth, inner glow, and rim shadow to separate edge decoration from the label lane.
checks: The label lane remains empty and readable
The button still reads as tappable after ornaments are added

primary_cta.outerDecoration: Large decorative wings and brass accents may extend near the edges, but they must frame rather than cross the label lane.
primary_cta.contentSurface: The center 50-60% width and text slot must stay clear for the runtime CTA label.
checks: No emblem, highlight streak, or ornament crosses behind the main label slot

mission_panel_shell.contentSurface: Leave the interior open for separate header, mission rows, progress bars, reward chips, and footer button placements.
checks: Do not draw fake mission rows, separators, timers, or receive buttons in the parent frame

info_panel_shell.contentSurface: Keep the parchment-like interior broad and quiet for rank text, progress, and action tiles.
checks: Header tab, rank emblem, progress bar, and action tiles remain separate child assets

gift_cta_shell.outerDecoration: Use the perimeter around the left icon dock and card body as decorative structure; the final gift icon and badge remain separate child content.
gift_cta_shell.contentSurface: The title, subtitle, gift icon, and notification badge slots must stay empty and readable. Draw only the empty dock/socket affordance, not the slot contents.
checks: Do not bake the gift crate, notification number, title text, or subtitle text into the shell

gacha_cta_shell.outerDecoration: Use the right orb socket rim and outer card perimeter as decorative structure; the final orb remains a separate child content asset.
gacha_cta_shell.contentSurface: The title, subtitle, and orb slots must stay empty and readable. Draw only the empty socket affordance, not the orb contents.
checks: Do not bake the gacha orb, title text, or subtitle text into the shell

nav_bar_shell.contentSurface: Stay behind repeated tab buttons as a base rail; do not draw individual tab frames, icons, or labels.

promptAdditions: Use polished bevels, intentional rim highlights, layered edge accents, and production-ready spacing.
Make the asset look like a purchasable game UI pack part, not a placeholder mock.

button: Preserve a clear center lane for runtime labels
Use edge highlights and shadow to separate from the screen
panel: Keep the content area calm and readable
Do not bake child rows, labels, or icons into the parent shell
card_frame: Preserve inner space for art, text, or child placements
Keep corner ornaments outside functional lanes
icon: Use a simple high-contrast interior silhouette
background: Keep primary UI placement zones calm enough for overlays
Do not bake UI panels or labels into the background

primary_cta: Feels premium without sacrificing tap clarity
ambient_backdrop: Provide depth and worldbuilding without competing with foreground UI
mission_panel_shell: Leave stable readable space for mission rows and footer controls
info_panel_shell: Separate frame decoration from content area
nav_bar_shell: Support repeated tab buttons without baking labels or icons

targetTraits: 羊皮紙系の情報パネル
高密度だが読みやすい常設HOME

notes: 参照KVは背景画ではなく、完成HOME画面モックとして扱う
主CTA、上部情報、下部ナビまで含めて情報密度を合わせる
空港都市らしい機能区画が背景から読み取れること

bg_sky_port_home.prompt: KV参照から生成したHOME背景単体。UI、文字、パネルを含めず、中央に主CTA用の開いた甲板を持つ蒼空スチームファンタジー空港都市背景。
bg_sky_port_home.notes: ベータ用の実画像シード。UI overlays are assembled from separate assets.

btn_start_sortie.prompt: KV参照から生成した主CTAボタン実画像。文字はruntime overlayで載せるため焼き込まない。#00ff00 chroma-key背景で生成し、ローカルで透過PNG化。
btn_start_sortie.notes: ベータ用の実画像シード。button frame only; label is separated.

art_event_banner_fill.prompt: KV参照から生成したイベントバナー内部アート。イベント名「青空交易祭」とコピー「限定スキンや豪華報酬をGET！」を素材内に焼き込み。
art_event_banner_fill.notes: ベータ用の実画像シード。outer frame is a separate asset.

hub_profile_shell.prompt: KV参照から生成したhub_profile_shell実画像。#00ff00 chroma-key背景で生成し、ローカルで透過PNG化。
hub_profile_shell.notes: 上部プロフィールHUBシェル。文字、バッジ、進捗バーは別素材/overlay。

notes: ベータでは素材仕様書上の全50素材を一括生成対象にする
大型背景、主要パネル、ボタン、アイコンは built-in imagegen 由来の透過PNGを採用する
進捗バー、ドット、通知バッジなど形状安定性が重要な極小部品は local_raster_composite の透過PNGとして採用する
フォント、数値、通知数、残り時間、メニューラベルはruntime overlayとして素材に焼き込まない
出力PNGが存在する素材だけ一括生成時に実画像として採用する

referenceImages.notes: 採用したHOME画面KV。背景ではなく主要UI込みの目標イメージ。

principles: アイコンとテキストラベルは同一の水平センターラインに揃える
装飾フレームは外周バンドに収め、内側の地はカームに保つ
素材は最終ピクセルサイズで生成し、実行時の引き伸ばしに頼らない
